message:
test(stream,obligation): B10 invariant tests for buffered, chunks, session_types

Adds 9 invariant tests across 3 under-tested modules:

stream/buffered.rs (3 tests):
- buffered_respects_in_flight_limit: in_flight never exceeds configured limit
- buffered_empty_stream_terminates: empty stream yields None immediately
- buffer_unordered_empty_stream_terminates: same for unordered variant

stream/chunks.rs (3 tests):
- chunks_empty_stream_returns_none: empty stream produces no chunks
- chunks_size_one_yields_individual_items: boundary case, each item as [item]
- chunks_exact_divisible_no_partial: no partial chunk when evenly divisible

obligation/session_types.rs (3 tests):
- send_permit_dual_channels_share_identity: duality invariant for new_session
- delegation_pair_preserves_metadata: delegation channels preserve id/kind
- lease_multiple_renew_cycles: 2 renew cycles before final release

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
